title: Backend Development Intern
description: Work on real payment infrastructure at Razorpay. Build backend APIs, fix production bugs, and learn from senior engineers in a fast-paced fintech environment.

title: Frontend Development Intern
description: Build and improve user-facing features on Swiggy's web platform. Work on React components, performance optimization, and A/B testing experiments.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Apply ML to real e-commerce problems at Flipkart. Work on recommendation systems, demand forecasting, or customer segmentation projects.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Intern
description: Help manage and improve Freshworks' cloud infrastructure on AWS. Automate provisioning, monitor services, and improve deployment pipelines.

title: Full Stack Intern
description: Build features for Zoho's suite of SaaS products. You'll work end-to-end from UI to API to database, mentored by experienced Zoho engineers.

title: ML Engineering Intern
description: Work on cutting-edge ML problems at Google India. Build models that impact millions of users across Google's products.

title: Android Development Intern
description: Build features for the PhonePe Android app with 400M+ users. Work on performance, UX improvements, and new payment features.

title: DevOps Intern
description: Help build and maintain Meesho's CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure. Learn real-world DevOps at one of India's fastest growing startups.

title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Learn enterprise cybersecurity at HCL. Assist in vulnerability assessments, security monitoring, and incident response for global clients.

title: Product & Analytics Intern
description: Work with CRED's product team to drive data-driven decisions. Analyze user behavior, build dashboards, and run A/B test analysis.

title: Backend Engineering Intern
description: Build microservices for Ola's mobility and EV platforms. Own a real service end-to-end with mentorship from senior SDE.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Design beautiful shopping experiences at Myntra. Work on user research, wireframing, prototyping, and design handoff for the app and web.

title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Microsoft EXPLORE / SWE intern program. Work on real product features with full-time SDE mentors on Azure, Teams, or Xbox teams.

title: Data Engineering Intern
description: Build data pipelines at Amazon India. Work on large-scale data processing, ETL workflows, and analytics infrastructure.

title: React Developer Intern
description: Build the Zepto web experience for rapid grocery delivery. Work on performance, PWA features, and A/B testing at Zepto's fast-moving startup.
